_comment: Tracks synchronization between MAgPIE codebase and agent documentation
_instructions: Update this file whenever syncing with MAgPIE develop branch

pending_review._comment: Commits that have been identified but not yet integrated into documentation

recent_syncs.summary: Develop sync (6304d830b..0d7ebeb90, 53 commits, 9 touching modules/). Three GAMS-affecting changes. (1) 6b00f9dea (flohump) 'Fix youngsecdf wood production: use uncalibrated growing stock' — adds NEW cross-module interface im_growing_stock_ysf(t,j,ac) in M14 (declarations.gms:18, presolve.gms:64-71, clamps :80-81) and repoints the youngsecdf term of q35_prod_other to it (35_natveg/pot_forest_may24/equations.gms:166). Ungated, result-changing bugfix: youngsecdf carbon came from the UNCALIBRATED secdforest curve while its wood yield came from the FRA-2025-CALIBRATED one, so harvest on youngsecdf booked secondary-forest wood volumes against almost no carbon — an escape hatch from land-CO2 caps/prices. M35 is the sole consumer. (2) e45f538d1 (pvjeetze) 'LandMark' conservation option in M22 — consv22_all AND consv_prio22 each gained LandMark_IPLC_delineated / _indicative / _all (area_based_apr22/sets.gms:16-20, :22-26). (3) 58bde5788 + 3c81c56e1 (mishkos, PRISMA) — pol32 gained ndcdelay (dynamic_may24/sets.gms:19-20); f32_aff_pol description now 're-afforestation'. Docs updated: module_14.md (5th growing-stock block + interface/glossary/consumer/invariant entries + stale presolve citations 10-65 -> 10-81, 62-65 -> 75-81, 24-58 -> 24-71), module_35.md (q35_prod_other equation was VERBATIM WRONG at :538-539 and stated the bug as the design rationale; fixed + interface list), cross_module/carbon_balance_conservation.md (the one-curve invariant: a pool's harvest term and carbon term must be driven by the same growth curve, else harvest becomes carbon arbitrage), module_22.md (3 enumerations + the ICCA limitation, which LandMark partly retires), module_32.md (ndcdelay option + data-driven caveat), module_32_notes.md (NEW). config/default.cfg changed 62 lines but is COMMENT-ONLY (no cfg$gms$ realization or switch value changed; verified) — no default-realization drift.

changes_reviewed.description: Fix youngsecdf wood production: use uncalibrated growing stock (new interface im_growing_stock_ysf)
changes_reviewed.notes: NEW cross-module interface parameter im_growing_stock_ysf(t,j,ac), declared 14_yields/managementcalib_aug19/declarations.gms:18, computed presolve.gms:64-71 from pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac_uncalib (52_carbon/normal_dec17/declarations.gms:10; snapshotted pre-calibration at start.gms:43), clamped presolve.gms:80-81 with the same positivity + s14_minimum_growing_stock rules as im_growing_stock. Sync Rule 1 (grep ALL consumers) applied: the SOLE consumer model-wide is 35_natveg/pot_forest_may24/equations.gms:166 (the youngsecdf term of q35_prod_other). NOT a land_timber slice — land_timber is /forestry, primforest, secdforest, other/ (core/sets.gms:256-257) and youngsecdf is not a member; youngsecdf belongs to the M35-local set othertype35 (/othernat, youngsecdf/, pot_forest_may24/sets.gms:23-24), which is why a standalone parameter was needed. Doc-side: module_35.md:538-539 reproduced the PRE-FIX equation verbatim and :543 stated the BUG as the design intent ('youngsecdf uses secdforest growing stock since it has timber characteristics closer to secondary forest') — both corrected. Coherence: youngsecdf now reads the uncalibrated curve for all three of carbon (pot_forest_may24/presolve.gms:242), its 20 tC/ha maturation test (presolve.gms:117, changed 2026-04-20), and wood yield (this commit) — the wood yield was the last holdout.

changes_reviewed.description: added 'LandMark' conservation option in Module 22
changes_reviewed.notes: consv22_all (area_based_apr22/sets.gms:16-20) and consv_prio22 (:22-26) each gained LandMark_IPLC_delineated, LandMark_IPLC_indicative, LandMark_IPLC_all. Default c22_protect_scenario stays 'none' (input.gms:10), so default runs are unaffected. VALIDATOR-INVISIBLE drift class: Check 29 (check_set_members.py) tracks only the land family + c_pools/ag_pools, and by design never flags pure OMISSIONS (a strict-subset enumeration is not an error) — so a doc under-enumerating a set after an upstream addition cannot be caught mechanically. Hand-checked. Also updated the module_22.md 'Does NOT Model Indigenous & Community Lands' limitation, which LandMark IPLC partly retires (areas can now be protected; rights/tenure still not modelled).

changes_reviewed.description: added ndcdelay afforestation policy (PRISMA Asymmetric Roll-back)
changes_reviewed.notes: pol32 gained ndcdelay (dynamic_may24/sets.gms:19-20). SILENT-ZERO FINDING (documented in the new module_32_notes.md): c32_aff_policy has NO code branch — the entire selection is one lookup, p32_aff_pol(t,j) = round(f32_aff_pol(t,j,'%c32_aff_policy%'),6) (preloop.gms:182) — so a policy's substance is purely a COLUMN of the downloaded input npi_ndc_aff_pol.cs3 (input.gms:73). The input revision develop pins (rev4.131, per config/default.cfg cfg$input, matching this checkout's input/info.txt) ships that .cs3 with header 'dummy,dummy,none,npi,ndc' — 3 policy columns; affexp and ndcdelay appear 0 times in all 6405 lines. Neither the affexp commit (a54cd02c6, 2026-05-27) nor this one bumped cfg$input. GAMS leaves an absent table column at its 0 default with no error, so selecting ndcdelay (or affexp) yields an all-zero afforestation policy SILENTLY. Verified by code + input-file trace, NOT by running the model. Same switch-into-downloaded-table pattern as c22_protect_scenario -> f22_consv_prio (22_land_conservation/area_based_apr22/preloop.gms:42).

changes_reviewed.description: Minor fixes to GAMS code found by newest codeCheck
changes_reviewed.notes: COSMETIC ONLY, confirmed file-by-file. 09_drivers/aug17/sets.gms: 'sex Sex groups' -> 'sex "Sex groups"' (quoting; module_09.md does not reproduce the description -> zero doc impact). 15_food/anthro_iso_jun22: 'nutrition' set + fm_nutrition_attributes table descriptions quoted (same: quoting is GAMS syntax, the description text is unchanged -> zero doc impact). 14_yields/managementcalib_aug19/preloop.gms:99: i14_FAO_yields_hist -> i14_fao_yields_hist — GAMS identifiers are CASE-INSENSITIVE, so this is the same symbol, not a rename; no renames.json entry needed. It did require ONE doc edit: module_14.md:233 reproduces that exact preloop line verbatim, so the casing was updated to match the code.

validation_results.validator: validate_consistency.sh: completed=1, 42 checks, 40 passed, 0 errors, 2 pre-existing advisory warnings (6 docs referencing CLAUDE.md; example identifiers vm_production/vm_trade in reference/GAMS_Advanced_Features.md) — both pre-date this sync, confirmed by re-running the checker against a stashed working tree.
validation_results.note: A green validator does NOT mean this sync is complete: validate_consistency.sh greps the working tree and is structurally blind to doc-vs-develop drift, and Check 29 cannot see the M22/M32 set-omission class at all. The completion criterion was the hand-checked per-module review above.

recent_syncs.summary: Develop sync (ee98739fd..6304d830b). Exactly 1 GAMS-affecting commit: 931db85c4 (59_som: carry soil pcm_carbon_stock forward each timestep). All other commits in range are infra (Docker, slurm submit scripts, CI test-code.yaml, renv/activate.R, .Rprofile) or whitespace-only (config/default.cfg comment lines). Updated module_59.md (new postsolve carry-forward subsection + bug-fix callout in section 3.4), module_59_notes.md (warning 4), module_52.md (pcm_carbon_stock 'Update' line now splits ag_pools=M56 / soilc=M59), module_56.md (vm_carbon_stock 'Provided to self' now split by pool). Validator: 39 checks, 0 errors, 2 pre-existing advisory warnings (unrelated to this sync).

changes_reviewed.description: 59_som: carry soil pcm_carbon_stock forward each timestep
changes_reviewed.notes: Both SOM realizations (cellpool_jan23, static_jan19) postsolve.gms gain: pcm_carbon_stock(j,land,"soilc",stockType) = vm_carbon_stock.l(j,land,"soilc",stockType). Mirrors the ag_pools carry-forward in modules/56_ghg_policy/price_aug22/postsolve.gms:8. Citations: cellpool_jan23/postsolve.gms:13, static_jan19/postsolve.gms:9. pcm_carbon_stock is declared in M56, consumed by q52_emis_co2_actual (M52) and q56_emis_pricing_co2 (M56, price_aug22/equations.gms:19). BUG fixed: pre-fix the soilc pcm stayed at its preloop initialization and was never updated, so the soil emission term computed a cumulative-since-init stock change over a single timestep length instead of a per-timestep flux (~17x off in a default H12 run). Default runs unaffected: default c56_emis_policy=reddnatveg_nosoil (config/default.cfg:1810) excludes soil; dynamic-SOM soil reporting routes through magpie4::emisSOC. Affected: soil-inclusive emission/cap policies or post-processing reading per-pool soil vm_emissions_reg directly.

validation_results.validator: validate_consistency.sh: completed=1, 39 checks, 37 passed, 0 errors, 2 pre-existing advisory warnings (6 docs referencing CLAUDE.md; example identifiers vm_production/vm_trade in reference/GAMS_Advanced_Features.md) — both unrelated to this sync.

recent_syncs.summary: 24-commit develop sync; 5 GAMS-affecting commits in 2 modules. module_21 selfsuff_reduced_bilateral22 (non-default) resynced: equation count 8->9, feasibility-import valve added (v21_import_for_feasibility + q21_cost_trade_feasibility), q21_trade_reg_up removed, presolve.gms deleted. module_32 dynamic_may24: affexp afforestation-expansion policy added (4th c32_aff_policy/pol32 option; default unchanged = npi). Validator: 43 checks, 0 errors. Semantic validation: targeted round R40 (3 adversarial auditors vs origin/develop + G2 anchor, 0 false refutations, 2 minor fixed).

changes_reviewed.description: Bugfix to bilateral trade to avoid infes in SSP4/SSP5
changes_reviewed.notes: selfsuff_reduced_bilateral22 only. Added feasibility-import valve: new positive vars v21_import_for_feasibility(i_ex,i_im,k_trade) + v21_excess_prod(h,k_trade), new eqs q21_cost_trade_feasibility + q21_trade_reg_up; q21_trade_upper relaxed by the import slack and scenario-scaled; import-supply ratios capped at 1 (p21_import_supply_sum) in preloop; presolve.gms (which fixed vm_cost_trade_feasibility=0) deleted. v21_import_for_feasibility free only for k_import21 subset.

changes_reviewed.description: Remove overproduction punishment equation (pending deeper solution)
changes_reviewed.notes: selfsuff_reduced_bilateral22 only. Removed eq q21_trade_reg_up and var v21_excess_prod (and the v21_excess_prod term from q21_cost_trade_feasibility). Net: bilateral22 = 9 equations on develop.

changes_reviewed.description: Added affexp afforestation expansion policy (ELEVATE Good Performance)
changes_reviewed.notes: dynamic_may24: pol32 set gains 4th member affexp; c32_aff_policy options now none/npi/ndc/affexp (default stays npi). affexp = NPI-2025 baseline + country-specific forest expansion targets after 2030 as a share of available potential forest, differentiated developing/developed. Uses the same f32_aff_pol / npi_ndc_aff_pol.cs3 mechanism; no new equation.

changes_reviewed.description: Update preloop.gms (#889) - codecheck whitespace
changes_reviewed.notes: selfsuff_reduced_bilateral22 preloop.gms: trailing-newline only, no behavior change.

recent_syncs.summary: 27-commit sync. Three GAMS-affecting feature PRs: #866 bilateral-trade overhaul, #871 IPOPT solver, #876 secondary-forest natural-origin carbon tracking. Updated module_11/14/21/35/52/80 docs; fixed stale vm_cost_trade and v21_cost_trade_reg references across cross_module/ and reference/ docs. Validator: 33/33 checks pass.

changes_reviewed.description: PR #866: Major update to bilateral trade implementation
changes_reviewed.notes: All three M21 realizations (exo, selfsuff_reduced, selfsuff_reduced_bilateral22) rewritten. Interface variable vm_cost_trade removed, split into vm_cost_trade_tariff / vm_cost_trade_margin / vm_cost_trade_feasibility — all three summed into M11 q11_cost_reg. Internal v21_cost_trade_reg removed; equations q21_cost_trade_reg + q21_cost_trade replaced by q21_cost_trade_tariff/margin/feasibility. New macro m21_baseline_production. bilateral22 q21_trade_bilat / f21_exp_shr replaced by an import-supply-ratio corridor. Config: s21_trade_tariff_fadeout removed; added s21_trade_tariff_factor, s21_stddev_lib_factor, s21_import_supply_scenario, s21_import_supply_scenario_targetyear, s21_trade_scenario_adjustments.

changes_reviewed.description: PR #871: Adding IPOPT as an alternative solver for MAgPIE
changes_reviewed.notes: New non-default realization nlp_ipopt (declarations/input/preloop/realization/solve.gms). Default remains nlp_apr17. Interior-point Ipopt solver; writes ipopt.opt and ipopt.op2 option files at runtime.

changes_reviewed.description: PR #876: Natural-origin tracking for secondary forest carbon density (+ refactor 2fa7b8bea)
changes_reviewed.notes: M35 pot_forest_may24: new p35_secdforest_natural, pc35_secdforest_natural, p35_carbon_density_secdforest; q35_carbon_secdforest uses the blended density. M52 normal_dec17: bisection upper bound no longer hardcoded 0.3 — new scalars s52_k_high_secdf (0.1), s52_k_high_plant (0.15).

changes_reviewed.description: M14 yields preloop change; M15 food postsolve whitespace
changes_reviewed.notes: M14 managementcalib_aug19: p14_pyield_corr now applies the historical/LPJmL ratio for every year f14_pyld_hist is available (y1965-y2020) and freezes the last value forward, replacing the t_past-conditional. M15 anthro_iso_jun22 postsolve change was operator-placement whitespace only — no doc impact.

validation_results.validator: validate_consistency.sh: 33/33 checks pass (variables 828/828, equations 138/138, realizations 72/72, citations 2332/2332, default realizations 46/46)

recent_syncs.summary: Large sync — 49 commits across 30 modules. Major theme: forestry/timber/carbon overhaul (PR #869 ipopt_part1, PR #872 bef-bcef-option2). Updated module_14, module_32, module_35, module_52, module_73 docs + module_29_notes. Scaling.gms refactor across 30+ modules deemed no doc update needed (solver scaling only).

changes_reviewed.description: PR #869 (ipopt_part1): Forestry module overhaul — BEF/BCEF fix, IPCC wood density, stacking factor, growing stock calibration
changes_reviewed.notes: Largest single commit in sync. Renamed pm_timber_yield → im_growing_stock (flux → stock). Renamed p32_yield_forestry_future → i32_growing_stock_at_harvest. Promoted s14_carbon_fraction → sm_carbon_fraction (superset). Renamed f14_ipcc_bce (2D) → fm_ipcc_bef (1D, interface). Renamed f14_aboveground_fraction → fm_aboveground_fraction (interface). Added Module 52 growing-stock calibration (preloop.gms, 118 new lines) with FRA 2025 targets, iter52 set, s52_growingstock_calib switch (default on). Added uncalib variants (pm_carbon_density_*_ac_uncalib) for afforestation/tree-cover. Added pm_land_plantation interface (M32 → M52). Added im_vol_conv (M52 → M73). im_timber_prod_cost now (i, kforestry). Added s32_est_cost_plant_reest replanting discount.

module_sync_status._comment: Track which modules may need updates based on code changes

recently_updated.reason: Commit 931db85c4: both SOM realizations (cellpool_jan23, static_jan19) now carry soil pcm_carbon_stock forward each timestep in postsolve.gms (mirroring ag_pools in M56). Added postsolve carry-forward subsection + bug-fix callout in section 3.4 and warning 4 in module_59_notes.md. Pre-fix the soilc pcm was frozen at preloop init, so the soil emission term was ~17x off for soil-inclusive policies.
Commit 931db85c4: pcm_carbon_stock 'Update' line corrected to the per-pool carry-forward split (ag_pools in M56 postsolve, soilc in M59 postsolve). Consumed by q52_emis_co2_actual.

Commit 931db85c4: vm_carbon_stock 'Provided to self' (carry-forward to next-timestep pcm_carbon_stock) now documented as split by pool - M56 postsolve carries ag_pools, M59 SOM postsolve carries soilc. Consumed by q56_emis_pricing_co2.

PR #866: all three realizations rewritten. vm_cost_trade split into vm_cost_trade_tariff/margin/feasibility; v21_cost_trade_reg removed; new equations q21_cost_trade_tariff/margin/feasibility; bilateral22 import-supply-ratio corridor; new tariff-fade and import-supply scenario scalars.
PR #866: q11_cost_reg now sums vm_cost_trade_tariff + vm_cost_trade_margin + vm_cost_trade_feasibility in place of the former single vm_cost_trade (regional-cost term count 30 -> 32).
PR #871: new non-default nlp_ipopt realization (interior-point Ipopt solver). Default remains nlp_apr17.

PR #876: natural-origin tracking for secondary-forest carbon density — new p35_secdforest_natural / pc35_secdforest_natural / p35_carbon_density_secdforest; q35_carbon_secdforest uses the blended density.
PR #876: growing-stock bisection upper bound no longer hardcoded 0.3 — new scalars s52_k_high_secdf (0.1) and s52_k_high_plant (0.15).
p14_pyield_corr pasture-yield correction now uses historical f14_pyld_hist for all available years (y1965-y2020) with last-value freeze, replacing the t_past-conditional.

PR #869: pm_timber_yield → im_growing_stock (flux → stock semantic); fm_ipcc_bef / fm_aboveground_fraction / sm_carbon_fraction promoted to interface/superset; s14_minimum_growing_stock replaces s14_minimum_wood_yield.
PR #869: Tree-cover on cropland now reads pm_carbon_density_*_ac_uncalib (new uncalibrated variants from M52). Documented in module_29_notes.md.

PR #869: p32_yield_forestry_future → i32_growing_stock_at_harvest; s32_est_cost_plant_reest replanting discount; im_timber_prod_cost now (i, kforestry); pm_land_plantation new interface parameter to M52.

PR #869: All three production equations (q35_prod_secdforest, q35_prod_primforest, q35_prod_other) use im_growing_stock instead of pm_timber_yield. Corrected upstream dependency attribution (was mis-attributed to M73; now correctly attributed to M14).

PR #869: Major addition — 118-line preloop.gms for Chapman-Richards k calibration to FRA 2025 growing-stock targets via bisection. New FRA target input files. New interface im_vol_conv (consumed by M73). New uncalib variants preserved for afforestation. New reads from M28, M32, M14 (sm_carbon_fraction, fm_ipcc_bef, fm_aboveground_fraction).

PR #869 + PR #872: Cost equation rewritten (4 terms now — base, natveg premium, residue, slack). im_timber_prod_cost now (i, kforestry) using im_vol_conv from M52. Scalar units changed (USD17MER/tDM → USD17MER/m3 at source, 148→89, 74→44). New scalars s73_natveg_cost_premium (0.15), s73_woodfuel_stacking_factor (0.65). Renamed s73_reisdue_removal_cost → s73_residue_removal_cost (typo fix, 2.5→2.7). Residue equation rewritten (includes plantation + natveg + both products). Removed f73_volumetric_conversion.csv (moved to M52's f52_volumetric_conversion).
f_btc2 conservation tau feature - new equations, cluster-level vm_tau

sync_workflow.description: How to keep documentation in sync with MAgPIE code
steps: 1. Run 'git log develop --oneline -N' to see recent commits
2. Identify commits that affect GAMS modules (not just R scripts, configs)
3. For each relevant commit, check if it changes equations, parameters, or logic
5. If doc updates needed, update the relevant module_XX.md files
6. Mark updates complete in this log
